task: Go to the URL and complete the table-based form by filling in all required fields and submitting. If needed, create a file. Validate that the form was filled and submitted successfully. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/table-form.html
graderReasoning: The agent successfully completed all aspects of the task. It navigated to the specified URL, analyzed the table-based form, and systematically filled in all required fields including email, country, date of birth, and gender. A key part of the task was to create and upload a file, which the agent handled effectively, demonstrating good error recovery when initial attempts failed due to directory existence and variable scope issues in the REPL. Finally, the agent submitted the form and successfully validated the submission by identifying the 'Success! Form submitted successfully!' message on the page. The trajectory shows clear planning, execution, and robust error handling.
